name_en: Celine #Triomphe Bag👉TRIOMPHE (French for 'triumph', Arc de Triomphe)💗From the name to the design details, it is an innovative definition of the brand's history💫. Leather shoulder strap, single shoulder/crossbody / Imported calfskin 🐃 Gold metal hardware 🔱 Lambskin lining, brass lock, can be worn on shoulder or crossbody. Interior zip pocket and flat pocket. Adjustable leather shoulder strap. 0891# Dimensions: 18cm/ 22cm
